title: ヒーロー＆ヒロイン映画の秋！

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! The Justice All-Stars vs the Villain Squad is finally out!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
My heart's fluttering with excitement! ♪ Carrot
Ranger, Princess Fighter... All the best heroes
teamed up for justice! This is going to be a
classic.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Heh, did you guys even watch the trailer? The
villains are pretty strong this time around!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what did you say?! Carrot Ranger will never
give up, no matter who the villain is!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
You sure about that? 'Cause the heroes got
knocked right off their feet in the trailer!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to burst your bubble, but the bad guys are
winning today!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh, dang it! The bad guys were so close...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh dear... There's no need for all those tears.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: I'm not crying!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Being an ally of justice, I would never
support the forces of evil, but...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I know where you're going. I feel for Windy too. If
Princess Fighter ever lost, I'd be a sobbing mess.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Graaaah! Enough already! I don't need your pity!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
My only option is to lash out! I'll spoil the movie
for everyone who hasn't seen it yet!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: You're going to what?! Not on my watch!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
As a princess, I cannot overlook this. I'll use every
last drop of my princess power to stop you!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Hah! You can't scare me! I'm spoiling the story,
and you'll never change my mind!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Are you so sure of that?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
If you spoil it for everyone, you'll ruin the climax
when King Bad Guy makes his comeback!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Wha?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
The moment his tragic past is revealed, and in the
end when he protects his allies and takes the final
blow... It's so admirable for a bad guy!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! He might've been the bad guy, but his story
was super moving! And you want to take that
experience away?

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
N-no, I'd never! I want everyone to know how
cool King Bad Guy is!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Okay... I won't spoil anything. Everyone's gotta
have the full experience!
